rationale: The cited paper appears directly relevant to the citing paper’s core modeling problem: the citing study jointly models channel visits and purchase decisions along a path-to-purchase, while the cited study develops a dynamic joint model of purchase incidence/order size and channel selection in multichannel migration. Given this strong construct and method overlap (channel migration, purchase dynamics, heterogeneous customer-level Bayesian modeling), this is not an obvious incidental mention and merits full relation judgment.
